resolution: Fixed - Standardized commit message format across commands to use conventional commit format with scopes
title: Inconsistent Commit Message Format
description: The commit message format is not consistently followed across commands, which can lead to confusion.

root_cause_potential: Lack of standardized commit message guidelines
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Enforce a standardized commit message format across all commands

immediate_fixes.action: Create and document standardized commit message format
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure consistency across all project commits

immediate_fixes.action: Update existing commands to follow standard format
immediate_fixes.rationale: Align all documentation with consistent formatting

impact_assessment.user_impact: Low - Minor confusion in commit history
impact_assessment.urgency: Low - Can be resolved as part of regular maintenance
